headline: Healthcare Workforce Migration Costs Malaysia 1,200 Doctors Annually
context: Approximately 1,200 Malaysian doctors emigrate each year seeking better pay and working conditions abroad.

cards.big: 1,200 Malaysian doctors leave for overseas positions every year since 2022
cards.sub: Government invests RM500,000 per doctor in medical education that benefits other countries

cards.big: Singapore employs an estimated 3,800 Malaysian-trained doctors in its health system
cards.sub: Proximity and 3-fold salary gap make Singapore the top destination for medical migrants

cards.big: MOH starting salary for medical officers is RM5,200 versus SGD6,500 in Singapore
cards.sub: Currency-adjusted gap is approximately 2.8 times favoring Singapore

cards.big: Philippines stemmed nurse migration by creating NHS-equivalent career ladders since 2020
cards.sub: Structured career progression and domestic salary improvements reduced outflow 25%

cards.big: Training doctors for export is the most expensive form of foreign aid Malaysia provides
Should Malaysia introduce retention packages matching regional salary benchmarks for doctors
